episodes.title: “No Prince Protected Me” | Lisa Phillips Reads Explosive Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Lisa Phillips delivers a powerful speech from the Epstein Reading Room in NY’s reading from the Epstein files and calling for accountability for survivors everywhere.

00:00 "One Day I'll Meet a Prince"
00:32 Lisa Describes Meeting Prince Andrew on Little St. James
00:46 Prince Andrew, Buckingham Palace and “Lots of Privacy” (File # EFTA02418972)
01:03 Peter Mandelson Stayed At Epstein’s Home After His Pedophilia Conviction
01:38 Disgusting Correspondence Between Peter Mandelson and Jeffrey Epstein (File # EFTA00772923)
01:51 Message to Survivors Around the World: "You're Not Alone"
02:23 “The Evidence Exists”
02:46 Maxwell, Epstein, and the Metropolitan Police Service (File # EFTA00640480)
03:04 "Every Child Deserves Protection and Dignity"
03:46 Calling Witnesses and Survivors to Come Forward
03:58 Prince Andrew’s Protection Officer and Epstein’s Home
04:18 Ghislaine Maxwell: Crimes Against Children Demand Accountability"
04:58 Prince Andrew and Epstein “Playtime” Email (File # EFTA02022016)
05:22 Why Ghislaine Maxwell Shouldn't be Pardoned
05:41 Metropolitan Police and DOJ Correspondence (File # EFTA00640480)
06:21 Lisa Calls for Accountability Across the UK and Europe
06:38 Deeply Disturbing Survivor Testimony Warning (File# EFTA02731361)
08:18 Lisa Reads King Charles Official Statement About Prince Andrew
